---
title: "test_annex_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_annex_empire.py"
loc: 8
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.15
style_score: 8.14
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 6.25
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_annex_scan. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 8.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.core.annex](file://src.core.annex)

### Exports
- `test_annex_scan`
